x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Risk scoring configuration enables Now Assist GRC to provide quantified AI risk assessment recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure risk scoring methodology (likelihood x impact). Ensure all active risks have a residual_risk_score greater than zero. A score of 0 provides no quantified signal for Now Assist GRC.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cf0
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Risk scoring configuration enables Now Assist GRC to provide quantified AI risk assessment recommendations.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Risk Scoring Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_risk_risk');
    gaTotal.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No active risk records found',
            finding: 'No active risks in the risk register. Risk scoring cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaScored = new GlideAggregate('sn_risk_risk');
    gaScored.addQuery('active', true);
    gaScored.addQuery('residual_risk_score', '>', 0);
    gaScored.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaScored.query();
    var scored = gaScored.next() ? parseInt(gaScored.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((scored / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active risks have residual scores (' + scored + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of risks have residual risk scores — Now Assist GRC can provide quantified AI risk recommendations.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of risks have residual scores (target: 80%). Now Assist GRC quantified risk assessment will have gaps for unscored records.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: (total - scored) + ' risks missing residual risk scores (' + pct + '% scored). Now Assist GRC quantified risk assessment requires scored risk records.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>GRC</module><number>CHK0000463</number><order>90</order><remediation_guidance>Configure risk scoring methodology (likelihood x impact). Ensure all active risks have a residual_risk_score greater than zero. A score of 0 provides no quantified signal for Now Assist GRC.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cf0</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Risk Scoring Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cf0</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
